title: Enable playable songs in track lists

requirements.text: Add playable audio sources to the existing mock track data so that at least the Home page trending tracks and Artist profile popular tracks have `audioSrc` values that point to audio files in `frontend/public/assets/` (e.g., `.mp3`).

quotes: I wanna add song for playing

acceptanceCriteria: `frontend/src/data/homeContent.ts` trending track items include `audioSrc` for at least 1–3 tracks.
`frontend/src/data/artistContent.ts` track items include `audioSrc` for at least 1–3 tracks.
All referenced `audioSrc` paths resolve to files under `frontend/public/assets/` and load successfully in the browser (no 404).

requirements.text: Make the Play buttons on track cards actually start playback: when a user clicks the Play overlay on a Home page trending track card or an Artist profile track row, the UI must open an audio playback UI using the existing `frontend/src/components/AudioPlayer.tsx` component and start playing the selected track’s `audioSrc` when available.

quotes: I wanna add song for playing

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking Play on a trending track starts playback for that track (when `audioSrc` is present).
Clicking Play on an artist’s popular track starts playback for that track (when `audioSrc` is present).
If a track has no `audioSrc`, the UI clearly indicates audio is not available (reusing the existing AudioPlayer fallback behavior is acceptable).

requirements.text: Ensure only one track plays at a time across the app: starting playback for a new track must stop/pause any currently playing track opened from these track lists.

quotes: I wanna add song for playing

acceptanceCriteria: When a second track is played, the previously playing track is paused/stopped.
There is no overlapping audio from multiple AudioPlayer instances.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui (shadcn components are read-only).
Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts(x), frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, or frontend/src/main.tsx (immutable paths).
Keep the backend as-is (no new backend logic required for this change).
nonGoals: Implementing real uploads or storing audio on the backend canister.
Adding likes/follow/share functionality beyond existing static UI.
Streaming, DRM, or advanced audio processing features.
